title: Email Validation Error Handling on User Invitation
story: As a product administrator, I want to see a clear error message when I enter an invalid email address while inviting a user, so that I can correct the input without encountering a system error page.
description: Fix error handling when an invalid email address is entered during the user invitation flow. Previously, submitting an invalid email caused an unhandled server error. The fix adds client-side or server-side email format validation with a user-friendly error message.
acceptance_criteria: Entering an invalid email during invitation shows a user-friendly validation error
No unhandled server errors or Laravel error pages for invalid email input
Valid emails continue to process normally
ux_changes: User-friendly validation error message displayed when an invalid email is entered in the invitation form.
middleware_changes: Added email format validation to the invitation endpoint with proper error response handling.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the validation issue and pushed to staging for review.
